Package neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.closure

Class OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector.OilWaterResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.closure.OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector.OilWaterResult
Enclosing class:
OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector
public static class OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector.OilWaterResult extends Object
Result of oil-water flow regime detection.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final double
    criticalDispersionVelocity
    Critical mixture velocity for full dispersion (m/s).
    final double
    effectiveViscosity
    Effective emulsion viscosity (Pa.s).
    final double
    inversionWaterFraction
    Phase inversion water fraction (volume fraction at which continuous phase switches).
    final double
    maxDropletDiameter
    Maximum stable droplet diameter (m) using Hinze (1955) criterion.
    final boolean
    oilContinuous
    True if oil is the continuous phase.
    final OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector.OilWaterFlowRegime
    regime
    Detected flow regime.
    final boolean
    waterDropoutRisk
    Water dropout risk: true if water may separate and accumulate.
    final boolean
    waterWetting
    True if water wets the pipe wall (corrosion concern).

    • regime

      public final OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector.OilWaterFlowRegime regime
      Detected flow regime.

    • waterWetting

      public final boolean waterWetting
      True if water wets the pipe wall (corrosion concern).

    • effectiveViscosity

      public final double effectiveViscosity
      Effective emulsion viscosity (Pa.s).

    • inversionWaterFraction

      public final double inversionWaterFraction
      Phase inversion water fraction (volume fraction at which continuous phase switches).

    • criticalDispersionVelocity

      public final double criticalDispersionVelocity
      Critical mixture velocity for full dispersion (m/s).

    • maxDropletDiameter

      public final double maxDropletDiameter
      Maximum stable droplet diameter (m) using Hinze (1955) criterion.

    • oilContinuous

      public final boolean oilContinuous
      True if oil is the continuous phase.

      public final boolean waterDropoutRisk
      Water dropout risk: true if water may separate and accumulate.

  • Constructor Details

    • OilWaterResult

      public OilWaterResult(OilWaterFlowRegimeDetector.OilWaterFlowRegime regime, boolean waterWetting, double effectiveViscosity, double inversionWaterFraction, double criticalDispersionVelocity, double maxDropletDiameter, boolean oilContinuous, boolean waterDropoutRisk)
      Constructor for OilWaterResult.
      Parameters:
      regime - the detected flow regime
      waterWetting - whether water wets the pipe wall
      effectiveViscosity - effective emulsion viscosity (Pa.s)
      inversionWaterFraction - phase inversion water fraction
      criticalDispersionVelocity - critical velocity for full dispersion (m/s)
      maxDropletDiameter - maximum stable droplet diameter (m)
      oilContinuous - whether oil is the continuous phase
      waterDropoutRisk - whether there is risk of water dropout
